items.title_en: JetBlue to reduce Newark, LaGuardia footprint as it forges ahead in Fort Lauderdale
items.title_zh: 捷蓝航空将减少纽瓦克和拉瓜迪亚机场在劳德代尔堡的发展
items.desc_en: JetBlue is planning to cut crew bases at Newark Liberty International Airport in New Jersey and New York's LaGuardia Airport.
items.desc_zh: 捷蓝航空计划削减新泽西州纽瓦克自由国际机场和纽约拉瓜迪亚机场的机组人员数量。

items.title_en: Trump sabotages Senate bid to fast-track Clayton as DNI, committee scuttles hearing
items.title_zh: 特朗普破坏参议院快速推进克莱顿的努力，因为国家情报总监、委员会破坏了听证会
items.desc_en: Any delay, and continuation of acting DNI Bill Pulte in the role, is likely to endanger the reauthorization of a key U.S. intelligence authority.
items.desc_zh: 国家情报总监比尔·普尔特（Bill Pulte）的任何延迟和继续代理职务都可能危及美国重要情报机构的重新授权。

items.title_en: Serial killer who murdered eight women in Long Island town imprisoned for life
items.title_zh: 在长岛镇谋杀八名妇女的连环杀手被终身监禁
items.desc_en: In fiery exchange, judge sentenced him to three life sentences plus 25 years to life on four other charges, all running consecutively.
items.desc_zh: 在激烈的交锋中，法官判处他三项无期徒刑，外加其他四项罪名，判处 25 年无期徒刑，所有罪名都是连续执行的。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: SpaceX, JPMorgan, UniQure, Intel, Figma, Nano Nuclear & more
items.title_zh: 中午涨幅最大的股票：SpaceX、摩根大通、UniQure、英特尔、Figma、Nano Nuclear 等
items.desc_en: These are some of the stocks posting the largest moves midday.
items.desc_zh: 这些是中午涨幅最大的一些股票。

items.title_en: AI will create more jobs for humans, not replace them, Amaon founder Bezos says
items.title_zh: Amon创始人贝佐斯表示，人工智能将为人类创造更多就业机会，而不是取代他们
items.desc_en: The Amazon founder, who now has robotics and space travel companies, thinks AI will create a labour shortage.
items.desc_zh: 这位亚马逊创始人现在拥有机器人和太空旅行公司，他认为人工智能将造成劳动力短缺。

items.title_en: UniQure to seek FDA approval for Huntington's disease gene therapy after previous clash with agency
items.title_zh: UniQure 在与 FDA 发生冲突后寻求 FDA 批准亨廷顿病基因治疗
items.desc_en: The announcement comes months after UniQure became embroiled in a public debate with FDA leaders over the clinical trial data supporting its application.
items.desc_zh: 几个月前，UniQure 与 FDA 领导人就支持其申请的临床试验数据卷入了一场公开辩论。

items.title_en: Less than one-third of global workers feel their jobs are safe, ADP survey data shows
items.title_zh: ADP 调查数据显示，全球不到三分之一的工人认为自己的工作是安全的
items.desc_en: Even with global unemployment at historically low levels, workers are not feeling secure.
items.desc_zh: 即使全球失业率处于历史低位，工人们也没有安全感。

items.title_en: Google, Nvidia and Anthropic bosses' AI tips for students
items.title_zh: 谷歌、英伟达和 Anthropic 老板给学生的人工智能建议
items.desc_en: Sundar Pichai, Jensen Huang and Jack Clark share their advice with the BBC.
items.desc_zh: 桑达尔·皮查伊 (Sundar Pichai)、黄仁勋 (Jensen Huang) 和杰克·克拉克 (Jack Clark) 与 BBC 分享了他们的建议。

items.title_en: Kevin Warsh set to lead his first Federal Reserve interest rate meeting. Here's what to expect. - CBS News
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 将主持他的第一次美联储利率会议。这是值得期待的事情。 - 哥伦比亚广播公司新闻

items.title_en: Mangione's lawyers plan psychiatric defence in state murder trial
items.title_zh: 曼吉奥内的律师计划在国家谋杀案审判中进行精神病学辩护
items.desc_en: They will argue he was suffering from "extreme emotional disturbance" at the time UnitedHealth CEO Brian Thompson was killed.
items.desc_zh: 他们会辩称，联合健康首席执行官布莱恩·汤普森被杀时，他正遭受“极度情绪困扰”。

items.title_en: Allbirds continues AI pivot with name change and CEO hire, sending stock soaring
items.title_zh: Allbirds 继续以人工智能为重心，更名并聘请首席执行官，股价飙升
items.desc_en: Allbirds became NewBird AI in April and said it would trade shoes for AI compute infrastructure.
items.desc_zh: Allbirds 在四月份更名为 NewBird AI，并表示将以鞋子换取 AI 计算基础设施。

items.title_en: Amazon AI exec predicts first 'commercially useful' quantum computers in 5-7 years
items.title_zh: 亚马逊 AI 高管预测 5-7 年内将出现第一台“具有商业用途”的量子计算机
items.desc_en: Quantum computing is becoming an increasingly competitive field with tech giants like Microsoft, Google and IBM developing the technology.
items.desc_zh: 量子计算正在成为一个竞争日益激烈的领域，微软、谷歌和 IBM 等科技巨头都在开发这项技术。

items.title_en: This medical diagnostics stock is ready for a big move higher, charts show
items.title_zh: 图表显示，这只医疗诊断股票已准备好大幅上涨
items.desc_en: Frank Cappelleri of CappThesis breaks down the technicals on NTRA.
items.desc_zh: CappThesis 的 Frank Cappelleri 详细分析了 NTRA 的技术原理。

items.title_en: SpaceX stock sinks 5%, losing momentum after a multiday rally
items.title_zh: SpaceX 股价下跌 5%，在多日上涨后失去动力
items.desc_en: Elon Musk's space and AI company has seen its stock surge since its blockbuster IPO on Friday.
items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的太空和人工智能公司自上周五大规模首次公开募股以来，其股价大幅上涨。

items.title_en: The private space race is spurring a luxury hotel land grab for Florida oceanfront property
items.title_zh: 私人太空竞赛正在刺激豪华酒店争夺佛罗里达海滨地产的土地
items.desc_en: The rise of the private space industry, with companies like SpaceX and Blue Origin, has spurred demand for commercial real estate on Florida's space coast.
items.desc_zh: SpaceX 和 Blue Origin 等公司的兴起，刺激了佛罗里达州太空海岸商业地产的需求。

items.title_en: Nigerian man jailed for storing human faeces outside his home
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚男子因在家外储存人类粪便而被判入狱
items.desc_en: Neighbours said the stench from the property had become so overwhelming that it was impossible to relax at home.
items.desc_zh: 邻居们表示，房子里的恶臭太严重了，根本不可能在家里放松。

items.title_en: Iran sends tankers loaded with oil past US military blockade
items.title_zh: 伊朗派遣满载石油的油轮突破美国军事封锁
items.desc_en: Three Iranian tankers loaded with crude oil have passed the US blockade line in the Gulf of Oman, ship-tracking data shows.
items.desc_zh: 船舶跟踪数据显示，三艘满载原油的伊朗油轮已通过美国在阿曼湾的封锁线。

items.title_en: Fed meeting live updates: Here's everything to expect from Kevin Warsh's first rate decision
items.title_zh: 美联储会议实时更新：以下是凯文·沃什首次利率决定中值得期待的一切

items.desc_zh: 美联储周三的利率决定是凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 掌舵的第一个利率决定。

items.title_en: Bystanders smash windows of private jet to rescue passengers after crash
items.title_zh: 私人飞机坠毁后，旁观者砸碎窗户营救乘客
items.desc_en: One of the six people on board died in the crash, a local official said. The five survivors were taken to hospital and are in a stable condition.
items.desc_zh: 当地官员称，机上六人中有一人在事故中死亡。五名幸存者被送往医院，目前情况稳定。

items.title_en: 'Passive' investors who dodged bitcoin are now forced to own SpaceX, which is three times more volatile
items.title_zh: 躲避比特币的“被动”投资者现在被迫拥有 SpaceX，该公司的波动性是其三倍
items.desc_en: Many advisors and money-managers invested in index funds who will soon be owners of Elon Musk's astronomic ambitions
items.desc_zh: 许多顾问和资金经理投资了指数基金，这些基金很快将成为埃隆·马斯克天文野心的所有者

items.title_en: Carvana’s new vehicle strategy turns dealership into ‘playground,’ test-drive center with sales all online
items.title_zh: Carvana的新车战略将经销店变成“游乐场”、试驾中心，销售全部在线进行
items.desc_en: But don't expect Carvana to sell you a vehicle at one of its seven Stellantis stores, marking a stark contrast from typical franchised dealers.
items.desc_zh: 但不要指望 Carvana 会在其七家 Stellantis 商店之一向您出售车辆，这与典型的特许经销商形成鲜明对比。

items.title_en: Leader of South Africa's second biggest party wants his predecessor sacked as minister
items.title_zh: 南非第二大党领袖希望解除前任部长职务
items.desc_en: John Steenhuisen is one of South Africa's best-known politicians after leading the DA for seven years.
items.desc_zh: 约翰·史汀惠森 (John Steenhuisen) 领导民主联盟七年，是南非最著名的政治家之一。

items.desc_en: Under its new president, Bolivia is re-establishing severed ties with the US to combat organised crime.
items.desc_zh: 在新总统的领导下，玻利维亚正在重建与美国断绝的关系，以打击有组织犯罪。

items.title_zh: 武装人员冲进刚果民主共和国医院后寻找六岁埃博拉患者

items.title_en: Trump says U.S. will 'go right back to dropping bombs' if he doesn't like Iran deal
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，如果他不喜欢伊朗协议，美国将“立即重新投掷炸弹”
items.desc_en: U.S. President Donald Trump said Wednesday at the G7 conference that the U.S. will "go right back to dropping bombs" if he doesn't like the Iran deal.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普周三在七国集团会议上表示，如果他不喜欢伊朗协议，美国将“立即重新投掷炸弹”。

items.desc_zh: Snapchat 母公司的增强现实眼镜预计将于秋季发货。

items.desc_en: Crown Princess Mette-Marit, who suffered from pulmonary fibrosis, will now spend several weeks recovering in hospital.
items.desc_zh: 患有肺纤维化的王储妃梅特玛丽特现在将在医院康复数周。

items.desc_zh: 特朗普周二表示，以色列总理本杰明·内塔尼亚胡需要“对黎巴嫩更加负责”。
